calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2019 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Justin Farrelly.
Dept. 514. Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Kristen Sleezer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Pamela Ritter, Assistant Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Justin Farrelly.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on December 20, 2018, and personally served on defendant Justin Farrelly on December 30, 2018.
Default as to defendant Justin Farrelly was entered on May 6, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 6, 2019.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. submitted the following exhibit for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Monthy statments to defendant from April, 2010 through June, 2015..........ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against the default defendant Justin Farrelly, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $49,480.78.
Costs - $595.48.

Total - $50,076.26.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of Exhibit 1.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Continued To Oct-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Aug-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Continued To Aug-21-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Continued To Jul-03-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
